name: The Greater Cannabis Company, Inc.
summary: The Greater Cannabis Company, Inc., a biopharmaceutical company, focuses on the development and commercialization of technology for transmucosal delivery of legal medical or recreational cannabis and cannabinoids. It intends to commercialize the technology by sublicensing or partnering with licensed producers, distributors, processors, consumer product, and pharmaceutical companies. The company was founded in 2014 and is based in Baltimore, Maryland.
